subject: Missing information in optics.star file Warp to Relion 4.0.1
body:
Hi guys,

I am following the tt tutorial for the Warp-Dynamo-Relion pipeline with my 
own data. I extracted subtomograms in Warp at 5Apx according to the 
settings given in the tutorial. Now in Relion, the _optics.star is missing 
entries for the optics causing an error in Relion. The entry now looks like 
this:


data_optics

loop_ 
_rlnOpticsGroup #1 
_rlnOpticsGroupName #2 
_rlnImagePixelSize #3 
_rlnImageSize #4 
_rlnImageDimensionality #5 
           1 opticsGroup1     5.000000           60            3

How cann I pass along the missing information? Thanks and all the best,

Felix
